explanation: This is the original command and serves as a baseline for testing.
Substituted '-Command' with '-c', which is an equivalent short option in PowerShell.
Replaced 'rm' with its full form 'Remove-Item', which is functionally equivalent.
Removed quotes around the registry path, which are not required in this context.
Added an optional '-WindowStyle Hidden' parameter, which does not affect the core behavior of the command.
Added an optional '-ExecutionPolicy Bypass' parameter, which does not affect the core behavior of the command.
Added an optional '-NonInteractive' parameter, which does not affect the core behavior of the command.
Replaced 'powershell.exe' with 'pwsh', the modern PowerShell executable, which is functionally equivalent.
Appended '| Out-Null' to suppress output, which does not affect the core behavior of the command.
Added '-Verb RunAs' to simulate execution with elevated privileges, which does not alter the core action of the command.
